query: SELECT dp.planDate, dp.id AS plan_id, COUNT(sb.id) AS blocks FROM dailyPlans dp LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks sb ON sb.dailyPlanId = dp.id WHERE dp.planDate IN ('2026-05-27','2026-05-28') GROUP BY dp.id, dp.planDate ORDER BY dp.planDate;
